full_text:
Wu Shi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Shiwas born in Guangling. Devoted officer of Sun Jiao, later aided Sun Huan. Wu Shi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
